name: Arizer - Tuff Bowl Grips Pack
summary: Shield your fingers from hot bowls with the Arizer - Tuff Bowl Grips Pack.
description: Shield your fingers from hot bowls with the Arizer - Tuff Bowl Grips Pack. These official Arizer XQ2 bowl grips, made of heat-resistant black silicone, come in a convenient pack of two. To protecting your fingers, they also absorb minor impacts and bumps, providing cushioning for your glassware. Compatible with XQ2 / Extreme Q / V-Tower. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
